title: Server Components
description: Async components that render on the server.

options: Fetch data directly, be async, and NOT ship JS to the client
questions.explanation: They render only on the server; interactive parts become Client Components.

questions.prompt: You mark a Client Component with:
options: 'use client' at the top of the file
questions.explanation: Everything else is a Server Component by default in RSC frameworks.
But NOT the reverse: Client Components can't import Server Components.

options: await data directly in the component
questions.explanation: No more useEffect + setState dance for initial data.
